title: eriosema fasciculatum
intro: Eriosema fasciculatum, also known as the Cluster Pea, is a perennial flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its high content of alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The health benefits of Eriosema fasciculatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and is said to have been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other conditions.
